surface: the release-to-discard-to-sibling-sink matrix re-run against the epoch-3 candidate with the N5-A falsified-state cells (release detached with base_branch 'HEAD', release on the feature branch with base_branch naming the discarded branch, sweep detached with 'HEAD', sweep on an arbitrary lane with base_branch naming that lane), the N5-B race cell (a git shim re-pointing HEAD between staging and commit), both F1 triggers, and the full prior matrix across all four edition copies
